subject: 物理
raw_question_text:
How large should these pulls be?
A patient with a dislocated shoulder is put into a traction apparatus as shown in figure. The pulls $\vec{A}$ and $\vec{B}have equal magnitudes and must combine to produce an outward traction force of 12.8 N on the patient’s arm.
multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

image field contains a PIL image placeholder rather than an extractable path or URL

subject: 物理
raw_question_text: All of the stars of the Big Dipper may appear to be the same distance from the earth, but in fact they are very far from each other. figure shows the distances from the earth to each of these stars.The distances are given in light-years (ly), the distance that light travels in one year. One light-year equals $9.461 \times 10^{15} m$.To an inhabitant of a planet orbiting Merak. how many degrees apart in the sky would Alkaid and our sun be?
